10536862.title: Secret Lives of the Super Rich
10536862.description: One of the most-exclusive stretches of sand in the world, Rihanna's Los Angeles mansion, a mega-mansion for a horse, and a super jet with a super secret owner.

10543232.title: Secret Lives of the Super Rich
10543232.description: Helicopter empress Lynn Tilton is blonde, beautiful and a self-made billionaire. Also, the super rich aren't just reaching new heights; they're reaching new depths with super jets that fly under water.
